title: Slow-attention fallback warning prints on every forward pass
body: CausalSelfAttention.__init__ prints 'WARNING: using slow attention...' once when self.flash is False, which is expected, but under torch.compile with recompilation the warning appears to get re-triggered repeatedly during training, spamming the logs.

title: configurator.py can't override nested dict config values
body: The 'poor man's configurator' only supports --key=value overrides where key is a top-level global matching an existing type. There's no way to override something like a nested optimizer setting without adding a new top-level variable in train.py first.

title: DDP training hangs when gradient_accumulation_steps isn't divisible by world size
body: train.py divides gradient_accumulation_steps by ddp_world_size to get per-GPU accumulation steps. When it doesn't divide evenly, training doesn't error immediately but hangs later during the all-reduce because ranks end up doing a different number of micro-steps.

title: Document required checkpoint fields for init_from='resume'
body: sample.py and train.py both branch on init_from == 'resume' and load ckpt_path expecting specific keys (model_args, optimizer, etc.), but there's no documentation of the checkpoint schema for anyone writing a custom training loop that wants to be resumable.

title: openwebtext prepare.py can't resume after being interrupted
body: data/openwebtext/prepare.py tokenizes the whole dataset in one pass and writes train.bin/val.bin at the end. If the process is killed partway through (common on a preemptible instance), all progress is lost and it has to restart the tokenization from scratch.
